sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 16.72 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.16)

statement.latex: Does there exist an exponential-time algorithm for obtaining a JSJ-decom\-po\-si\-tion of a finitely generated fully residually free group? Some algorithm was found in (O.\,Kharlampovich, A.\,Myasnikov, in: Contemp. Math. AMS$($Algorithms, Languages, Logic\/), 378 (2005), 87--212). { A.\,G.\,~Myasnikov, O.\,G.\,Kharlampovich}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
